emotional_tone: Objective, fast, reliable, institutional, data-dense, operational

mono.usage: Use for all P&L values, ticker prices, timestamps, and data table cells

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Dense Control Room Grid - optimize for scanning and maximum data density without overwhelming the user.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight spacing. Use p-4 for widget containers, p-2 or p-3 for inner elements.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Use 1px sharp borders border-slate-200. No rounded corners (rounded-none) or maximum rounded-sm for specific micro-elements.

cards_and_widgets.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-none shadow-none flex flex-col
cards_and_widgets.header_style: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-200 px-4 py-3 bg-slate-50

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-4 py-2 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.action_start: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 text-white font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.action_stop: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white font-mono uppercase text-xs tracking-wider px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 font-mono text-xs px-4 py-2 transition-colors

tables.headers: text-xs uppercase text-slate-500 bg-slate-50 px-3 py-2 font-mono text-left border-b border-slate-200
tables.cells: text-sm font-mono text-slate-800 px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap border-b border-slate-100

chart_container.style: relative w-full h-[450px] border border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center

badges.live: bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 border border-emerald-200 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase flex items-center gap-1
badges.demo: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 border border-amber-200 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono uppercase flex items-center gap-1

motion.philosophy: Instantaneous updates. Avoid layout shifts. Flash colors for P&L ticks.

empty_state_texture.description: Black and white abstract geometric grid pattern. Apply as background with heavy opacity (opacity-[0.03]) in empty states or uninitialized chart views.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons with stroke-width 1.5 or 2. Keep icons minimal. Examples: Play (start bot), Square (stop bot), Activity (live status), Settings (strategy params).

header.layout: Flex container, justify-between, items-center. border-b border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-3 sticky top-0 z-50
header.content: Brand Logo/Text on left, Ticker (NIFTY FUT) in center with price, Demo/Live Mode Toggle & Bot Start/Stop Button on right.

main_dashboard.layout: Grid cols-1 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 p-4 bg-slate-100 min-h-[calc(100vh-60px)]

content: 1. Renko Chart View Card (Main visual surface, high density, large height)
2. Trade Log Table Card (Recent entries/exits underneath)
1. Overall Metrics Card (Total P&L in massive typography, Win Rate)
2. Current Open Position Card (Direction, Qty, Entry Price, Live P&L)
3. Strategy Settings Panel Card (Brick Size, Lot Size, Target logic)

accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Add descriptive data-testid to every button, input, table row, toggle, and dynamic number. Use kebab-case roles (e.g., data-testid='start-bot-button').
accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text passes APCA/WCAG AA contrast. Especially red/green P&L text against white/grey backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure React + Tailwind CSS strictly using .js files.
Implement the 'Control Room' layout grid: sharp 1px borders, tight padding, and dense typographic scales.
Use monospace font via Tailwind (font-mono) for all numerical values. This is critical for trading UIs where users track fast-moving numbers.
P&L values must be formatted exactly and colored based on state (Green for positive, Red for negative). Include +/- signs explicitly.
Make the UI feel like a scanning surface: lead with the primary price/P&L metrics. Strip away generic 'SaaS' styles like rounded large corners or big shadows.
Bot Start/Stop must have explicit state indication. Open position card should highlight strongly when a trade is active.
Strategy parameters input fields must use small, tight inputs appropriate for a high-density dashboard.
